combined_text: What Is the United Nations and How Does It Work? "US Economy Economic Terms What Is the United Nations and How Does It Work? Share Flip Pin Email•••By Kimberly Amadeo Updated October 17, 2017The United Nations is an international organization of 193 member-states. It was founded in 1945 to prevent another world war. Its headquarter is in New York.
